---
title: "now_bf_chlor_a_v4.init"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../charm.html)

Backfill DINEOF nowcast configuration for chlorophyll-a.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.text}
{{< include ../../workflows/charm/config/bf_dineof/chlor_a/now_bf_chlor_a_v4.init >}}
```

:::
